Title: LBD NUMBER COULD NOT BE FOUND TO COPY THE TITLE
Summary: Authorizes the Medford fire district, located in Suffolk county, to deposit into the insurance reserve fund an amount of $400,000 in each of the years 2026, 2027 and 2028.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general municipal law, in relation to contributions paid into the insurance reserve fund by the Medford fire district
